vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. The pots contain no visible foliage, only soil and debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in black pot; white rabbit anchor is present but obscured by debris.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no String of Nickels detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no Mexican Mint detected.
plant_audit.P3: Empty soil surface; no Pothos detected.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no Silver Guest detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark, appears damp/saturated across all frames.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments on the surface of the black pot (P3/P4 area).
biome_observations.desk_surface: No significant changes to the immediate desk environment.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: Over the 5-day sequence, there is zero evidence of growth or recovery. The state of the pots remains static and devoid of biological activity.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: All specimens are confirmed as 'Systemic Loss'. The lack of any green tissue or structural development suggests either total mortality or that the pots were never successfully populated/germinated.
vision_report.anomalies: The white fragments in the black pot are a persistent, uncatalogued intervention (likely crushed eggshell or mineral deposits).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The biome is currently a collection of inert, damp soil containers. The white rabbit anchor is present but serves no purpose as the Pothos it was meant to scale is absent. No signs of life, fungal growth, or incidental weeds were detected throughout the observation window.
